name: Jeff Porcaro
abstract: Jeffrey Thomas Porcaro (April 1, 1954 – August 5, 1992) was an American drummer and songwriter. He is best known for being the co-founder and drummer of the rock band Toto, but he is also one of the most recorded session musicians in history, working on hundreds of albums and thousands of sessions.

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: I did a tour with Boz Scaggs with Jeff Porcaro for the first month of the tour we were playing double drums with Jeff Porcaro
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Ralph Humphrey
about_quotes.evidence: He has authored a number of percussion method books and directed the Percussion Institute of Technology with Jeff Porcaro.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ralph Humphrey interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003
